mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO video_comment (task_id, bvid, comment_id, username, gender, content, like_count, reply_count, publish_time, sentiment_score, sentiment_label, aspect) VALUES
(#{comment.taskId}, #{comment.bvid}, #{comment.commentId}, #{comment.username}, #{comment.gender}, #{comment.content}, #{comment.likeCount}, #{comment.replyCount}, #{comment.publishTime}, #{comment.sentimentScore}, #{comment.sentimentLabel}, #{comment.aspect})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE like_count = VALUES(like_count), reply_count = VALUES(reply_count)
mapper.select: SELECT comment_id AS commentId, task_id AS taskId, bvid, username, gender, content, like_count AS likeCount, reply_count AS replyCount, publish_time AS publishTime, sentiment_score AS sentimentScore, sentiment_label AS sentimentLabel, aspect FROM video_comment WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY like_count DESC

SELECT comment_id AS commentId, task_id AS taskId, bvid, username, gender, content, like_count AS likeCount, reply_count AS replyCount, publish_time AS publishTime, sentiment_score AS sentimentScore, sentiment_label AS sentimentLabel, aspect FROM video_comment WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND sentiment_label = #{sentimentLabel} ORDER BY like_count DESC

SELECT comment_id AS commentId, task_id AS taskId, bvid, username, gender, content, like_count AS likeCount, reply_count AS replyCount, publish_time AS publishTime, sentiment_score AS sentimentScore, sentiment_label AS sentimentLabel, aspect FROM video_comment WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND aspect = #{aspect} ORDER BY like_count DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM video_comment WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
